summary: Payment Debit/Refund feature and Notification Services tested. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Fixed bug where transaction_type was not being returned in Payment API responses. Frontend code verified to have all required UI elements (Credit/Debit toggle, Type column, badges, summary card). Browser automation crashed after login due to resource constraints but login and API calls work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: transaction_type field was not being returned in Payment API responses (record_payment, get_payments, get_payment, update_payment endpoints)
FIXED: transaction_type update was not being handled in update_payment endpoint
Email templates 'consent_accepted' and 'daily_summary' exist in registry
NotificationService has send_consent_accepted_notification and send_daily_summary methods
Frontend Payments.js has all required UI elements: Credit/Debit toggle, Type column, badges, summary card with net revenue

success_rate.frontend: Code verified - browser automation crashed due to resource constraints

seed_data_creation: Created test payments with credit and debit transaction types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment Debit/Refund feature is complete. Backend APIs return transaction_type field. Frontend has Credit/Debit toggle buttons, Type column with badges, and summary card showing Net Revenue, Credit total, and Debit total. Email templates for consent_accepted and daily_summary exist. NotificationService has required methods.

GET /api/payments/reports/detailed retur.notes: Returns credit_amount, debit_amount, net_amount in summary

Payment table Type column.notes: Code verified - Type column with Credit/Debit badges

Summary card Net Revenue.notes: Code verified - Shows Net Revenue, Credit total, Debit total

Debit payments red color.notes: Code verified - text-red-600 class and minus sign for debit

bugs_fixed.issue: transaction_type field not returned in Payment response
bugs_fixed.fix: Added transaction_type to Payment model instantiation in record_payment, get_payments, get_payment, and update_payment endpoints
Added transaction_type handling in update_data dictionary
